Compliance.description: Global platform with SA VAT compliance; lacks full SA payroll/PAYE/UIF native support; SARS e-filing integration exists but limited.

Customer Satisfaction.description: G2 4.0/5; Capterra 4.3/5 globally; SA reviews positive on usability but concerns on SA-specific features.

Product Value.description: Good global accounting; strong invoicing/reporting; limited SA payroll/SARS-specific features without add-ons.

Innovation.description: AI categorization, bank feeds, mobile app (4.4/5), live bookkeeping, multi-currency, advanced reporting.

Customer Support.description: Chat/phone/email; global support but SA-specific expertise limited; mixed reviews on resolution.

Accessibility & Security.description: Cloud-based with strong security (encryption, 2FA); GDPR compliance; POPIA assumed; good mobile access.

socialSentiment.summary: Global positive sentiment; SA concerns on payroll/SARS gaps; usability praised.
